_meta.description: CosmoTender facts template. Update live_stats from Supabase analysis to refresh the website stats bar. animation_scenes documents the numbers baked into the Cosmic animation — update them here for reference, then rebuild scenes.jsx to apply changes to the video.

hidden_facts._note: Facts derived from the historic TenderNed database that don't surface at first glance. Update values by running the Supabase queries in the source field. Set confirmed=true once verified. These feed into new animation scenes — update scenes.jsx to add them.

facts.detail_nl: De meeste aanbestedingen werden gepubliceerd in februari 2024 — een stille maand voor biedteams die onverwacht veel kansen herbergt.
facts.detail_en: More tenders were published in February 2024 than any other month — a quiet month for bid teams that hides a surprising volume of opportunity.
facts.supabase_query: SELECT TO_CHAR(published_at, 'Month') AS month, COUNT(*) FROM tenders WHERE published_at BETWEEN '2024-01-01' AND '2024-12-31' GROUP BY 1, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM published_at) ORDER BY EXTRACT(MONTH FROM published_at)

facts.detail_nl: November is de maand met de meeste gunningen en deadlines in het TenderNed-archief — slim instarten in september geeft een beslissend voordeel.
facts.detail_en: November sees the most awards and deadlines in the TenderNed archive — starting smart in September gives a decisive edge.
facts.supabase_query: SELECT TO_CHAR(deadline, 'Month') AS month, COUNT(*) FROM tenders WHERE deadline IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM deadline) ORDER BY EXTRACT(MONTH FROM deadline)

facts.detail_nl: De CPV-code met de sterkste groei in gepubliceerde aanbestedingen (2025 vs 2024). Vereist cpv_code kolom in de tenders tabel.
facts.detail_en: The CPV code with the steepest growth in published tenders (2025 vs 2024). Requires cpv_code column in the tenders table.
facts.supabase_query: SELECT cpv_code, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE published_at >= '2025-01-01') AS n_2025, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE published_at BETWEEN '2024-01-01' AND '2024-12-31') AS n_2024, ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE published_at >= '2025-01-01') / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE published_at BETWEEN '2024-01-01' AND '2024-12-31'), 0) - 100, 1) AS growth_pct FROM tenders WHERE cpv_code IS NOT NULL GROUP BY cpv_code HAVING COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE published_at BETWEEN '2024-01-01' AND '2024-12-31') > 5 ORDER BY growth_pct DESC LIMIT 10

facts.detail_nl: Gemiddeld aantal dagen tussen publicatiedatum en deadline in het TenderNed-archief.
facts.detail_en: Average number of days between publication date and deadline in the TenderNed archive.
facts.supabase_query: SELECT ROUND(AVG(deadline - published_at)) AS avg_days FROM tenders WHERE deadline IS NOT NULL AND published_at IS NOT NULL AND deadline > published_at

facts.label_en: Sector with highest avg contract value
facts.supabase_query: SELECT sector, ROUND(AVG(contract_value_eur)) AS avg_eur, COUNT(*) AS n FROM tenders WHERE contract_value_eur IS NOT NULL GROUP BY sector ORDER BY avg_eur DESC

animation_scenes._note: These numbers are hardcoded in scenes.jsx inside the Cosmic animation bundle. Editing this file updates the reference only — to change what the animation shows, edit scenes.jsx and rebuild the standalone HTML.
